content.text:
The skill installer is waiting for you to select which agents/IDEs to install to. It currently has the universal ones selected (Amp, Antigravity, Cline, etc.) and you can use arrow keys + space bar to select additional ones like **Claude Code (.claude/skills)**.

Looks like you'll need to make your selections in the terminal. Want me to re-run it with `--yes` to auto-accept the defaults, including Claude Code?

content.thinking: The command is waiting for interactive input to select which agents to install to. This is an interactive CLI prompt. The user needs to navigate and select which agents/IDEs should receive this skill. Let me wait for the user to make their selection or help them with it.
